creator: ddrinnon@cdor.net
text:
I ran the 2 commands inside the Poudriere ref jail:

lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  22 Jun 12 18:27 /usr/lib/libutil.so -> ../../lib/libutil.so.9
root@freebsd_11-4x64-HEAD:/ # nm -gD /lib/libutil.so.9
